organisation: World Resources Institute (WRI) India & Food and Land Use Coalition (FOLU)
title: Regional Consultations & Report Author – Integrated Action Towards Food Systems Transformation
description: Conducted regional dialogues with civil society organisations and researchers as part of Stakeholder Consultations – Integrated Action Towards Food Systems Transformation, organised by FOLU India and based on the Food Systems Economics Commission’s (FSEC) recommendations. Authored the technical report 'Action Pathways Towards Food Systems Transformation in India: Consultation Outcomes of Food System Economics', synthesising consultation outcomes into actionable strategies for sustainable food systems reform.
